workflow.name: Puber Test Coverage
workflow.description: Plan, add, review, fix, and clean up focused Puber Android test coverage improvements.

transition_groups.description: Start focused test coverage analysis and planning.
Coverage plan is ready; user approval required before adding tests.
More test coverage steps remain; continue in the same session.
Test coverage implementation is complete and needs read-only review.
Review found test issues; user approval required before fixes.
Test fix pass completed; review again.
Test review passed; run mandatory compliance review before cleanup.
Cleanup report is ready; finish the task.
Compliance review found no violations; run conservative cleanup.
Compliance review found violations; user approval required before test fixes.
Compliance review is blocked by missing or contradictory required sources.

edges.prompt_template:
Run Puber test coverage planning for this Kent task.

Read .kent/project-contract.md first, then use .kent/commands/test-coverage.md phases 1-3. Treat the task body as the target package/path. Create an explicit .todo/test-coverage-<name> workspace; do not infer or create .todo/.current. Analyze source/test gaps and produce plan.md. Do not add tests yet.

Complete with implement when the plan is ready for user approval and provide workspace_path plus plan_path. Complete with blocked if the target path is ambiguous or unavailable and provide blocker_reason.

Implement the approved Puber test coverage plan.

Read .kent/project-contract.md first. Use .kent/commands/test-coverage.md phases 4-5 with workspace {{.Params.workspace_path}} and plan {{.Params.plan_path}}. Add one next unchecked test step at a time, verify narrowly, and update plan.md.

If more unchecked steps remain, complete with continue_implementation and provide workspace_path plus plan_path again. If all steps are complete, complete with review and provide workspace_path, plan_path, changed_files, and verification_summary. Complete with blocked on unresolved blockers and provide blocker_reason.

parameters.description: Path to the explicit .todo/test-coverage-* workspace.
Path to the test coverage plan.md being executed.

edges.prompt_template: Continue the approved Puber test coverage plan from {{.Params.plan_path}} in workspace {{.Params.workspace_path}}. Execute the next unchecked step, verify narrowly, update plan.md, and complete with continue_implementation, review, or blocked as appropriate.

parameters.description: Path to the explicit .todo/test-coverage-* workspace.
Path to the test coverage plan.md being executed.

edges.prompt_template:
Review the Puber test coverage changes read-only.

Read .kent/project-contract.md first. Check regression-test quality, locale-independent assertions, explicit expected values, AGENTS.md rules, and {{.Params.verification_summary}}. Do not edit files in this node.

Complete with done if accepted, needs_changes if fixes are required and provide workspace_path, review_report, and changed_files, or blocked if review cannot complete and provide blocker_reason.

parameters.description: Path to the explicit .todo/test-coverage-* workspace.
Path to the test coverage plan.md being executed.
Files changed by the test coverage work.
Commands run and their pass/fail results.

edges.prompt_template: Fix the Puber test coverage review findings. Apply only changes requested in {{.Params.review_report}}, verify narrowly, and complete with review or blocked.

parameters.description: Workspace containing the test coverage implementation.
Concrete test review findings to fix.
Files changed by the test coverage work.

edges.prompt_template: Re-review the fixed Puber test coverage changes. Complete with done, needs_changes, or blocked.

parameters.description: Workspace containing the test coverage implementation.
Original review findings and fix summary.
Files changed by the test coverage work and fixes.
Why planning cannot continue, in the task language when practical.
Why implementation cannot continue, in the task language when practical.
Why review cannot complete, in the task language when practical.
Why fixing cannot continue, in the task language when practical.

edges.prompt_template:
Run mandatory Puber Compliance Review before cleanup.

Read .kent/commands/compliance-review.md, .kent/project-contract.md, and AGENTS.md first. Reviewed scope: completed test coverage work in workspace {{.Params.workspace_path}}. Changed files: {{.Params.changed_files}}. Review only compliance with task requirements, test rules, specs, AGENTS.md, and workflow contract. Do not edit files.

Complete with done and provide compliance_report when no compliance violations are found. Complete with needs_changes and provide workspace_path plus compliance_report when fixes are required. Complete with blocked and provide blocker_reason if required sources are missing or contradictory.

parameters.description: Workspace containing the test coverage implementation.
Files changed by the test coverage work.
Summary of cleanup performed or deliberately skipped.

edges.prompt_template: Run conservative Puber task cleanup after compliance passed. Read .kent/project-contract.md first, then use .kent/commands/cleanup-task.md. Compliance result: {{.Params.compliance_report}}. Complete with done and provide cleanup_report.

parameters.description: Compliance review report, including rule sources checked and any findings.

edges.prompt_template:
Fix Puber test coverage compliance violations only.

Read .kent/project-contract.md and .kent/commands/compliance-review.md first. Apply only the minimum changes required by compliance findings in {{.Params.compliance_report}} for workspace {{.Params.workspace_path}}. Verify narrowly, then complete with review and provide workspace_path, review_report, and changed_files. Complete with blocked and provide blocker_reason if unsafe or missing input.

parameters.description: Workspace containing the test coverage implementation.
Compliance review report, including rule sources checked and any findings.
Why compliance review cannot complete, in the task language when practical.
